title: チューリップ賞にむけて

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The day of the Tulip Sho arrives. Vodka was
nervous at the Hanshin J.F., but this time she's
calm, with both feet firmly planted on the ground.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Vodka thanks me for easing her fears. She's
embarrassed to admit that Daiwa Scarlet also had
a helping effect.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Finally standing in the starting grid, Vodka faces
the race ahead, ready for the real beginning.
